title: FallingTree Enchantments
description: Additional datapack to add FallingTree enchantments
body:
Adds enchantments for [FallingTree](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingtree) in order to limit which tools activates the mod or to apply a different breaking mode per tool.

When this datapack is added and FallingTree is configured to required enchantments, several new enchantments will be added : 
* Chopper : When it is applied on an axe, the FallingTree mod will be activated
* Chopper (XXX) : When it is applied on an axe, the FallingTree mod will be activated using the specified XXX breaking mode (Instantaneous, shift down, ...)

If FallingTree is not installed, the enchantments will be available but they won't do anything.

Enchantments will be available both by trading villagers or by using the enchantment table.
If the behavior needs to be modified, simply modify the datapack yourself. The main things to modify are : 

* data/minecraft/tags/enchantment/non_treasure.json : Controls which enchants appears in the enchantment table
* data/minecraft/tags/enchantment/tradeable.json : Controls which enchants can be traded with villagers
